name: Date or Raisin Bran Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chopped pitted dates may be substituted to get Date Muffins.
2. Mix cereal and milk. Let stand a few minutes until most of the milk is absorbed.
3. Grease 12 2 1/2-inch muffin cups. Heat oven to 400 degrees F.
4. Sift flour, baking powder, salt, and sugar into a medium-sized bowl. Stir to mix well.
5. Add dates/raisins and nuts; toss to mix.
6. Add egg and oil to soaked cereal and beat well with a fork.
7. Pour batter into flour mixture and stir only until dry ingredients are moistened. Batter will be lumpy.
8. Drop batter into prepared pans, filling each cup half to two-thirds full.
9. Bake about 30 minutes, or until browned. Remove from pan and serve hot with butter and jelly or preserves.
